ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek to API - 客户端协议转通用API全栈中间件工具，轻量、高性能，多账号轮询，支持二进制编译文件、Vercel Serverless、Docker部署。Google、Claude、OpenAI多接口格式兼容

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
Language: go
GOWA - WhatsApp REST API with support for UI, Multi Account, Webhooks, and MCP, and Chatwoot. Built with Golang for efficient memory use.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cli/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cli/cli
Language: go
GitHub’s official command line tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coredns/coredns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coredns/coredns
Language: go
CoreDNS is a DNS server that chains plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: etcd-io/etcd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd
Language: go
Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gascity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gascity
Language: go
Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/osv-scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/osv-scanner
Language: go
Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go
Language: go
The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/consul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/consul
Language: go
Consul is a distributed, highly available, and data center aware solution to connect and configure applications across dynamic, distributed infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/vault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
Language: go
A tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 Run Background Tasks at Scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kgateway-dev/kgateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kgateway-dev/kgateway
Language: go
The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krillinai/KrillinAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krillinai/KrillinAI
Language: go
Video translation and dubbing tool powered by LLMs. The video translator offers 100 language translations and one-click full-process deployment. The video translation output is optimized for platforms like YouTube，TikTok. AI视频翻译配音工具，100种语言双向翻译，一键部署全流程，可以生抖音，小红书，哔哩哔哩，视频号，TikTok，Youtube等形态的内容成适配

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox
Language: go
agent-sandbox enables easy management of isolated, stateful, singleton workloads, ideal for use cases like AI agent runtimes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/typescript-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go
Language: go
Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: quic-go/quic-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/quic-go/quic-go
Language: go
A production-ready QUIC implementation in pure Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vxcontrol/pentagi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi
Language: go
Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
